goal: X.is_open(u) and Y.is_open(v) and box[X, Y](u, v) = box[X, Y](u, v)
exists(k0: Set[X], k1: Set[Y]) { X.is_open(k0) and Y.is_open(k1) and box[X, Y](u, v) = box[X, Y](k0, k1) }

proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[Pair[T0, T1]]) { exists(k0: Set[T0], k1: Set[T1]) { T0.is_open(k0) and T1.is_open(k1) and box[T0, T1](k0, k1) = x0 } = is_box[T0, T1](x0) }[X, Y](box[X, Y](u, v))
function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T2: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T2]) { not T0.is_open(x0) or not T2.is_open(x1) or is_box[T0, T2](box[T0, T2](x0, x1)) }[X, Y](u, v)
not is_box[X, Y](box[X, Y](u, v)) or not Y.is_open(v) or not X.is_open(u)

goal: generated_open[Pair[X, Y]](is_box[X, Y], box[X, Y](u, v))

proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T2: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T2]) { not T0.is_open(x0) or not T2.is_open(x1) or generated_open[Pair[T0, T2]](is_box[T0, T2], box[T0, T2](x0, x1)) }[X, Y](u, v)
function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[Pair[T0, T1]]) { generated_open[Pair[T0, T1]](is_box[T0, T1], x0) = is_open_in_product[T0, T1](x0) }[X, Y](box[X, Y](u, v))
not generated_open[Pair[X, Y]](is_box[X, Y], box[X, Y](u, v))

goal: is_box[X, Y](box[X, Y](u, v)) = exists(k0: Set[X], k1: Set[Y]) { X.is_open(k0) and Y.is_open(k1) and box[X, Y](u, v) = box[X, Y](k0, k1) }
proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[Pair[T0, T1]]) { exists(k0: Set[T0], k1: Set[T1]) { T0.is_open(k0) and T1.is_open(k1) and box[T0, T1](k0, k1) = x0 } = is_box[T0, T1](x0) }[X, Y](box[X, Y](u, v))
